query:
SELECT id, domain, status, scan_type, created_at, 
  CASE WHEN pipeline_output IS NOT NULL THEN LENGTH(pipeline_output::text) ELSE 0 END as pipeline_size,
  CASE WHEN results IS NOT NULL THEN LENGTH(results::text) ELSE 0 END as results_size
FROM domain_scans 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 50;
